name: Zadie Table Lamp - 15.5 Inch Height - TBL3012 - Black/Multi - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the stylish Zadie Table Lamp, a stunning piece that combines a sleek metal body with an eye-catching glass shade. Artfully crafted, the lamp features a bold black base that provides a contemporary foundation. Above it, the spherical multi-hued glass shade offers a captivating visual effect with its swirling patterns and variations in color that are sure to add a dash of artistic flair to any room.

Whether placed in a quiet reading nook or adding ambiance to a lively living room, the Zadie Table Lamp is versatile enough to complement a variety of decors while introducing a unique lighting experience. The glass shade diffuses the light in a soft, pleasing manner, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere wherever its used.

More than just functional lighting, this lamp acts as a statement piece that can bring together the look and feel of your interior. Embrace the sophistication and artistry of the Zadie Table Lamp, a perfect blend of form and function for any contemporary home.
